creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
Sorry about the delay.

I am fixing some remaining plist issues, and am looking into a way to echo a string every minute or so to indicate that the compilation has not yet failed (so that the build servers won't cancel the build).

It takes 2 hours to compile on a high spec machine, which is completely normal, but some phases of compilation can take over 30 minutes with no output.
